Presentations are a common format for sharing research findings, discussing ideas, or showcasing projects at conferences.

In the context of a conference, "submit" typically refers to the act of sending or presenting a proposal, abstract, paper, or other type of content for consideration by the conference organizers or selection committee. This could involve submitting an application to present at the conference, submitting a research paper for publication in the conference proceedings, or submitting a poster presentation for display at the conference.

In the context of a conference, "notification_until" typically refers to the deadline by which participants or presenters will be notified of their acceptance or rejection for participation in the conference.
